'''''Stardust''''' was a [[Muurian transport]] that carried musicians of the ''[[Dunari's Rest]]'' when the latter was attacked by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. The ship and its crew escaped to hyperspace intact thanks to assistance from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
